title: Customizable Brightness – Fullbright & Gamma Contro
description: Cycle through customizable brightness levels from 0% to 1000%+ with a keybind. Fullbright mod with 5+ stops, persistent settings, and GUI config.
body:
# Customizable Brightness – Fullbright & Gamma Control

Tired of fullbright mods that only have "on" or "off"? Want more control over your gamma settings? **Customizable Brightness** lets you cycle through **5+ brightness levels** with a single keybind, from pitch black (0%) to ultra-bright cave vision (1000%+).

## ✨ Key Features

*   **Multiple Brightness Stops**: Default levels at 0%, 100%, 200%, 500%, and 1000% – fully customizable
*   **One-Key Cycling**: Press `B` (configurable) to instantly switch between brightness levels
*   **Persistent Settings**: Remembers your brightness between game sessions
*   **Real-Time Feedback**: Action bar shows your current brightness percentage
*   **GUI Configuration**: Easy in-game editing via Mod Menu + Cloth Config (1.16.2+)
*   **Beyond Vanilla Limits**: Goes far past Minecraft's 100% gamma cap for ultimate cave visibility
*   **Complete Darkness Mode**: 0% brightness option for atmospheric/horror gameplay
*   **Massive Version Support**: Works on **40 Minecraft versions** from 1.14.3 to 1.21.11

## 🎮 Perfect For

*   Cave exploration without placing torches
*   Mining in deep dark areas with perfect visibility
*   Ancient city exploration
*   Night mining without potion effects
*   Speedrunners who need consistent lighting
*   Players transitioning from Optifine's dynamic lighting

## 📦 Installation

1.  Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
2.  Download Customizable Brightness for your Minecraft version
3.  Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder
4.  Launch Minecraft
5.  Press `B` to cycle brightness levels!

**Optional (for GUI config on 1.16.2+):**

*   [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
*   [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 🎯 Supported Versions

| Minecraft | Java |
|-----------|------|
| 1.14.3 – 1.16.5 | Java 8 |
| 1.17 – 1.17.1 | Java 16 |
| 1.18 – 1.20.4 | Java 17 |
| 1.20.5 – 1.21.11 | Java 21 |

## ⚙️ Configuration

*   **In-game**: Use Mod Menu → Customizable Brightness (requires Cloth Config, 1.16.2+)
*   **File**: `config/customizable_brightness.properties`
*   **Keybind**: Change in Minecraft Controls menu

Add, remove, or modify brightness stops to match your playstyle!

## ❓ FAQ

**Q: Does this work with shaders?**
A: Not really... It works going between 0%-100% but does not go higher.

**Q: Is this allowed on servers?**
A: This is a client-side mod, that being said, it could potentially give unfair advantages – check your server's rules.

**Q: Why not just use another fullbright mod?**
A: Most fullbright mods are simple on/off toggles. This gives you **granular control** with multiple stops, persistent settings, and a clean UI.

**Q: Can I set custom brightness levels?**
A: Absolutely! Edit the config file or use the GUI to set any value from 0% to 10000%.

## 🔗 Links

*   [GitHub Source Code](https://github.com/SimplyAG/CustomizableBrightness)
*   [Report Issues](https://github.com/SimplyAG/CustomizableBrightness/issues)
